description: Smooth and sophisticated, the david beckham deodorant spray for men is classic evening wear, with has fruity and woody undertones. This body spray has base notes of orange, mandarin and Italian bergamot, peppered with cardamom, pimento and star anise. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
